title: montrouziera verticillata
intro: Montrouziera verticillata, also known as the New Caledonian tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Clusiaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Montrouziera verticillata include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various infections, as well as its potential to have antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions.
